text: I am standing outside a glass-walled room, peering into a brightly lit exhibition space. The environment feels sterile and modern, almost clinical, yet beyond the glass there is color and creativity. I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation—poised on the edge of experience, aware that I am about to step into an unfamiliar, possibly thought-provoking environment. The fire safety signage and the glass serve as subtle reminders of vulnerability and separation between mundane reality and the promise of intellectual engagement inside.
